string.text: Combat thins the Zone faster than the engine refills it. AlifeBalance watches faction-level death pressure and quietly nudges quiet smart terrains to refill sooner using their own configured spawn pools. It does not spawn anything. Works alongside vanilla, ZCP, Redone, and any other spawner mod.
Master toggle. When off, no death tracking and no nudges.

How many deaths in one faction on one level before AlifeBalance triggers a single intervention. Cowardly mutants (rats, tushkanos, flesh, zombies, karliks) do not count. Higher = fewer interventions, slower recovery. Lower = more frequent interventions. Minimum 5 keeps the rate balanced against typical squad sizes.
Debug and development tools. DEBUG level enables structured tracing of every death classification, trip, and nudge to alifebalance.log. Has performance cost.
Controls log verbosity. ERROR: crashes only. WARN: anomalies. INFO: config and totals. DEBUG: every trip and nudge.
Display death totals, counted deaths, filtered deaths, intervention attempts, and successful nudges via PDA.
Clear all death counters and diagnostic stats. Existing nudges already written to smart-terrain timestamps persist; the engine resolves them on its next try_respawn.
